name: urdf
description: URDF robot description generation and default generation-time validation. Use when creating, editing, regenerating, inspecting, or debugging `.urdf` files, Python `gen_urdf()` sources, robot links, joints, limits, inertials, visual/collision geometry, mesh references, frame conventions, or generated robot-description artifacts. Use the SRDF skill for MoveIt2 semantic groups and IK/path-planning semantics; use the CAD Explorer skill for local MoveIt2 server controls; use the CAD skill for STEP/ST
author: earthtojake
summary_zh: 这是一个生成和验证机器人描述文件的工具，适合在创建、编辑、检查或调试机器人模型结构及相关代码时使用。
